2.q: This stringent interaction assay confirmed the specific binding affinity between AcMYB176 and the AcCHS5 promoter (proAcCHS5). Dual-luciferase assay showing transcriptional activation of AcCHS5 by AcMYB176.

3.q: the AcCHS5-OE lines exhibited a significantly higher flavonoid content compared to the WT lines.

4.q: Under salt stress, the AcCHS5-OE lines exhibited attenuated blue (NBT) and brown (DAB) staining intensities compared to the WT lines, indicating the reduced accumulation of H2O2 and O2·− in leaves.

5.q: the transcription factor AcMYB176 as a direct activator of AcCHS5 through binding to its promoter.
